name: ai-news-briefing-ecosystem
description: Official plugin marketplace for comprehensive research, analytics, and intelligence tools.

plugins.name: ai-news-briefing
plugins.description: Comprehensive AI news tracking, deep research agents, and automated Notion/Teams/Slack publishing.

plugins.name: last30days
plugins.description: An AI agent-led search engine scored by upvotes, likes, and real money. Searches Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web from the last 30 days.

plugins.name: trend-spotter
plugins.description: Analyzes GitHub trending repos, PyPI/NPM download spikes, and tech Twitter to identify emerging developer trends before they hit mainstream news.

plugins.name: earnings-analyzer
plugins.description: Fetches SEC filings, earnings call transcripts, and financial news to synthesize a business/financial briefing on a specific public company.

plugins.name: paper-reader
plugins.description: Connects to ArXiv and Semantic Scholar to find the latest AI/ML research papers, summarize their abstracts, and explain the methodology (ELI5).

plugins.name: competitor-intel
plugins.description: Given a company/product, finds its top competitors, compares feature releases, pricing changes, and customer sentiment.

plugins.name: repo-auditor
plugins.description: Analyzes a given GitHub repository for security vulnerabilities, stale dependencies, code quality, and bus factor.

plugins.name: podcast-summarizer
plugins.description: Extracts transcripts from technical podcasts or YouTube videos and synthesizes core arguments, guest insights, and actionable takeaways.

plugins.name: startup-scout
plugins.description: Tracks Y Combinator, Product Hunt, and recent VC funding rounds to identify promising early-stage startups in a specific sector.

plugins.name: crypto-tracker
plugins.description: Analyzes tokenomics, whitepapers, and crypto Twitter sentiment to provide fundamental analysis of crypto projects.
